title: pelargonium × propinquum
intro: Pelargonium × propinquum, also known as the Cape Geranium, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × propinquum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems, among others. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or a tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
